_comment: Default model-provider plugins auto-installed into every new Dify tenant during sudowork-server tenant provisioning. The seed script (dify/docker/sudowork-patches/seed-plugins.sh) resolves each entry to a full unique_identifier via Dify marketplace and downloads the .difypkg ahead of time so admin's install step never needs marketplace.dify.ai access. Edit this list to change the default suite — the change is picked up on the next provisioning, no code change needed.
_format: Each entry is `<org>/<id>:<version>`. The seed script resolves it to the full `<org>/<id>:<version>@<sha256>` via GET https://marketplace.dify.ai/api/v1/plugins/<org>/<id>/<version>. Pin to specific versions (NOT 'latest') so behavior is deterministic across rebuilds.
